strengths: Strong technical stack (Python, SQL, Snowflake, BigQuery)
Experience building KPI frameworks and dashboards
weaknesses: No insurance/financial services domain experience noted
Few mentions of program-level governance or risk escalation

improvement_bullets: Supported the execution of AI and technology-enabled transformation initiatives by developing Python-based automation for data ingestion and reporting, ensuring projects are completed on time and within scope.

Served as a liaison between business units and technology stakeholders to bridge operational and technical needs, facilitating stakeholder workshops and synthesizing feedback to optimize change adoption strategies.

Assisted in integrating new data solutions and digital processes with business operations, aligning transformation initiatives with Starr’s strategic objectives and identifying opportunities for process improvement.

Supported KPI identification and tracking, benefit realization, and reporting for transformation programs to executive leadership by creating advanced Power BI dashboards and analyzing data for actionable insights.

Engaged in assessment and evaluation activities related to AI and data modernization tools for business transformation, collaborating cross-functionally to assess feasibility and impact through proof-of-concept initiatives.
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to submit my application for the Senior Consulting Analyst opportunity with Starr. I am interested in this opportunity because Starr's reputation as a global leader in commercial insurance, coupled with its commitment to innovation and employee growth, deeply resonates with my career aspirations.

What interests me about working for Starr is its entrepreneurial culture and approach to empowering employees to make impactful decisions. This excites and inspires me because I thrive in environments where I can leverage data-driven insights to drive tangible business outcomes and contribute to strategic initiatives.

I believe my expertise in data analysis, process automation, and stakeholder communication would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a proactive, results-oriented mindset. In fact, at Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I developed Power BI and Looker workflows to replace manual reporting, reducing data mismatches and improving work efficiency by 40%. This initiative led to the creation of statistical models that identified high-value customer segments, contributing to a 300% increase in revenue in the targeted segment over 12 months.

Ultimately, I know that the Senior Consulting Analyst role at Starr would allow me to bring my analytical rigor and strategic thinking to drive enterprise change and deliver value across key strategic initiatives. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my cross-functional collaboration and stakeholder management skills. I built Python automation for weekly sales and operations reports, saving 8 hours per week and improving reporting accuracy for faster strategic decisions. I also standardized organizational KPIs and data governance frameworks, ensuring a consistent 'single source of truth' for all business stakeholders.

I’m excited by the opportunity to use my data modernization and process improvement skills in working on AI and digital transformation initiatives at Starr. I know that my proficiency in data analysis and my proactive approach align with what it takes to succeed in the Senior Consulting Analyst role.

I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Warm regards,
Justin Miller
